ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shellfish" (
  "shellfish_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shellfish */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the shellfish (M, F, I) */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the shellfish */,
  "diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the shellfish */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the shellfish */,
  "whole_wgt" REAL /* Whole weight of the shellfish */,
  "shucked_wgt" REAL /* Shucked weight of the shellfish */,
  "viscera_wgt" REAL /* Viscera weight of the shellfish */,
  "shell_wgt" REAL /* Shell weight of the shellfish */,
  "rings" INTEGER /* Number of rings on the shellfish */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement method */,
  "collected_on" TEXT /* Date when the shellfish was collected */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who collected the shellfish */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shellfish_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shellfish_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shellfish_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shellfish_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shellfish_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the shellfish species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "average_size" REAL /* Average size of the species */,
  "average_weight" REAL /* Average weight of the species */,
  "common_habitat" TEXT /* Common habitat of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement method */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement method */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the measurement method */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the measurement method */,
  "last_calibrated" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration of the measurement method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "shellfish_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shellfish being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the shellfish */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the shellfish was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_shellfish_id FOREIGN KEY ("shellfish_id") REFERENCES shellfish ("shellfish_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the water where the shellfish were collected */,
  "water_temperature" REAL /* Water temperature at the collection location */,
  "salinity" REAL /* Salinity of the water at the collection location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)
column_names: Sex of the shellfish (M, F, I)
Number of rings on the shellfish
Date when the shellfish was collected
ID of the user who collected the shellfish
Unique identifier for each measurement method
Date of the last calibration of the measurement method
Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin)
Date when the user account was created
Date of the user's last login
Unique identifier for each access event
ID of the shellfish being accessed
ID of the user accessing the shellfish
Date when the shellfish was accessed
IP address from which the access was made
User agent string of the device used to access the data

Water temperature at the collection location
Salinity of the water at the collection location
